<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Enough information has been gathered to compile the comprehensive report.

Phase 2.1 intake corrections follow explicit naming conventions: `Correct*` for identity, `Upsert*` for other sections, and `RemoveDocument` for document removal. The UI uses an edit form pattern in `RegistrationCaseDetail.razor`. Key files include `RegistrationCase.cs` with the `CorrectIdentity` domain method, `Person.Update`, and `RegistrationCaseCorrectionTests.cs`. The application layer places the handler under `Features/Registration/CorrectIdentity/`.

The API layer exposes PUT `/cases/{id}/identity` via `CorrectIdentityEndpoint.cs` mapped in `RegistrationEndpoints.cs`. The web layer calls `SaveIdentityCorrection` in `RegistrationCaseDetail.razor` and `CorrectIdentityAsync` in `RegistrationApiClient`. Integration tests live in `IntakeCorrectionTests.cs`, while domain unit tests are in `RegistrationCaseCorrectionTests.cs`. The RemoveDocument handler sits under `Features/Registration/RemoveDocument/` and reuses the `RecordIdentityRequest` validator. For the person file, the domain is a read model without a domain aggregate; it defines `IPersonFileQuery.cs` and summary records.

PersonFile infrastructure stores queries in `Persistence/Queries/PersonFileQuery.cs`. Application handlers cover `GetPersonFile`, `SearchPersonFile`, and `ListPersonCases`, protected by `FeatuileAuthorization.cs`. API endpoints live in `Features/PersonFile/PersonFileEndpoints.cs` and individual files like `GetPersonFileEndpoint.cs`. Web pages are `PersonFilePage.razor` and `PersonSearchPage.razor`, with `PersonFileApiClient.cs` and `IPersonFileApi.cs` handling API calls. Tests reside in `PersonFileTests.cs`.

The ChangeOfAddress slice begins with `Domain/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressCase.cs`.

The ChangeOfAddress slice continues with repository interfaces and implementations, EF Core configuration, and migrations. Application handlers live under `Features/ChangeOfAddress/{UseCase}/` alongside guards and authorization policies. API endpoints map to `Features/ChangeOfAddress/{UseCase}/{UseCase}Endpoint.cs` within `ChangeOfAddressEndpoints.cs`. The web layer uses `Pages/` and `Components/` folders, with `ChangeOfAddressApiClient.cs` handling API calls.

Test files are organized vertically by use case. Domain tests live under `Domain.Tests/ChangeOfAddress/`. Integration tests sit in `Integration.Tests/Features/ChangeOfAddress/`.
</details></think>

# SchaerbeekMunicipality Implementation Patterns

The codebase uses **vertical slices** per use case, organized by bounded context across layers. Below are the three patterns you asked for.

---

## Overall Folder Structure & Naming Conventions

```
src/
├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/{Context}/          # Aggregates, value objects, repository interfaces
├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/{Context}/{UseCase}/
│   ├── {UseCase}Handler.cs
│   ├── {UseCase}Request.cs / {UseCase}Response.cs
│   └── {UseCase}Validator.cs (optional)
├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/{Context}/
│   ├── {Context}Endpoints.cs                       # MapGroup + route wiring
│   └── {UseCase}/{UseCase}Endpoint.cs              # static Handle(...)
├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/
│   ├── Persistence/Configurations/{Aggregate}Configuration.cs
│   ├── Persistence/Repositories/{Aggregate}Repository.cs
│   └── Persistence/Queries/{Query}.cs              # read models only
└── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/
    ├── Features/{Context}/Pages/*.razor
    ├── Features/{Context}/Components/*.razor
    └── Api/{Context}/{Context}ApiClient.cs

tests/
├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Tests/{Context}/
├── SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/{Context}/
└── SchaerbeekMunicipality.E2E.Tests/Journeys/
```

| Element | Convention |
|---------|------------|
| Use-case folder | `{Verb}{Entity}` — e.g. `CorrectIdentity`, `OpenChangeOfAddressCase`, `GetPersonFile` |
| Handler | `{UseCase}Handler` — primary constructor DI, `Handle(...)` method |
| Endpoint | Static `{UseCase}Endpoint` with `Handle(...)` returning `IResult` |
| Route group | `{Feature}Endpoints.Map{Feature}Endpoints()` registered in `MunicipalApiHostExtensions.cs` |
| Strong IDs | `{Aggregate}Id` value objects (`RegistrationCaseId`, `ChangeOfAddressCaseId`, `PersonId`) |
| Guards / auth | `{Context}CaseGuard` + `{Context}CaseAuthorization` (or `PersonFileAuthorization` for read models) |
| DI | Handlers registered in `Application/DependencyInjection.cs` via `services.AddScoped<{UseCase}Handler>()` |
| Web API client | `{Context}ApiClient` implements `I{Context}Api`, extends `MunicipalApiClientBase` |

---

## 1. Phase 2.1 — Intake Corrections (`CorrectIdentity`)

Phase 2.1 uses three correction patterns (documented in `docs/features/registration/README.md`):

| Pattern | When | Examples |
|---------|------|----------|
| **Explicit `Correct*`** | Different invariants for first record vs correction | `RecordIdentity` / `CorrectIdentity` |
| **Upsert handler** | Same validation for create/update | `SetResidenceCategory`, `DeclareAddress` |
| **Separate remove** | Attach-only model | `AttachDocument` / `RemoveDocument` |

### File paths

| Layer | Path |
|-------|------|
| Domain method | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/RegistrationCase.cs` |
| Handler + response | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/CorrectIdentity/` |
| Endpoint | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/Registration/CorrectIdentity/CorrectIdentityEndpoint.cs` |
| Route wiring | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/Registration/RegistrationEndpoints.cs` (`PUT /api/registration/cases/{id}/identity`) |
| Web API client | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/Registration/RegistrationApiClient.cs` |
| UI (edit form) | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Pages/RegistrationCaseDetail.razor` |
| Related remove slice | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/RemoveDocument/` |
| Domain tests | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Tests/Registration/RegistrationCaseCorrectionTests.cs` |
| Integration tests | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/Registration/IntakeCorrectionTests.cs` |
| Docs | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/docs/phases/phase-2.1-intake-corrections.md`, `docs/features/registration/correct-identity.md` |

### Key pattern details

- **Reuses** `RecordIdentityRequest` + its FluentValidation validator (no separate `CorrectIdentityRequest`).
- Handler uses `RegistrationCaseGuard.GetForEditAsync()` for auth + lock checks.
- After domain mutation, runs `RegistrationExceptionEvaluator.EvaluateAndApplyAsync()` to refresh checklist flags.
- UI: saved section → **Edit** → pre-filled form → `RegistrationApi.CorrectIdentityAsync()` → `ReloadCase()`.

### Snippet A — Domain method

```160:173:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/Registration/RegistrationCase.cs
    public void CorrectIdentity(Person person, IdentityDetails identity)
    {
        EnsureIntakeDataEditable(nameof(CorrectIdentity));

        if (PersonId is null)
            throw new InvalidRegistrationTransitionException(
                "Identity has not been recorded for this case.");

        if (person.Id != PersonId)
            throw new InvalidRegistrationTransitionException(
                "The person does not belong to this registration case.");

        person.Update(identity);
    }
```

### Snippet B — Handler orchestration

```17:62:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/Registration/CorrectIdentity/CorrectIdentityHandler.cs
    public async Task<CorrectIdentityResponse> Handle(
        RegistrationCaseId caseId,
        RecordIdentityRequest request,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        await validator.ValidateAndThrowAsync(request, cancellationToken);

        var registrationCase = await caseGuard.GetForEditAsync(
            caseId,
            nameof(CorrectIdentity),
            cancellationToken);
        // ... load person, build IdentityDetails ...
        registrationCase.CorrectIdentity(person, identity);

        var evaluation = await exceptionEvaluator.EvaluateAndApplyAsync(
            registrationCase,
            cancellationToken);

        await caseRepository.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);
        // ... return CorrectIdentityResponse with checklist + PolicyMessage ...
    }
```

### Snippet C — UI save + reload

```683:707:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/Registration/Pages/RegistrationCaseDetail.razor
    private async Task SaveIdentityCorrection()
    {
        await _identityForm.ValidateAsync();
        if (!_identityFormValid || _identityModel.BirthDate is null) return;

        _savingIdentity = true;
        try
        {
            var request = MapIdentityRequest(_identityModel);
            var response = await RegistrationApi.CorrectIdentityAsync(CaseId, request, CancellationToken.None);
            Snackbar.Add("Identity updated.", Severity.Success);
            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(response.PolicyMessage))
                Snackbar.Add(response.PolicyMessage, Severity.Warning);
            await ReloadCase();
        }
        // ... catch ValidationException, InvalidRegistrationTransitionException ...
    }
```

## 2. Phase 16 — Person File (Read Model)

Person File is a **query-side read model** — no write aggregate. It composes data from Registration, BirthDeclaration, ChangeOfAddress, and certificates via `IPersonFileQuery`.

### File paths

| Layer | Path |
|-------|------|
| Query interface + DTOs | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/PersonFile/IPersonFileQuery.cs` |
| Query implementation | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Queries/PersonFileQuery.cs` |
| Handlers | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/PersonFile/GetPersonFile/`, `SearchPersonFile/`, `ListPersonCases/` |
| Authorization | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/PersonFile/PersonFileAuthorization.cs` |
| Endpoints | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/PersonFile/PersonFileEndpoints.cs` |
| Per-slice endpoints | `GetPersonFile/GetPersonFileEndpoint.cs`, `SearchPersonFile/SearchPersonFileEndpoint.cs`, `ListPersonCases/ListPersonCasesEndpoint.cs` |
| Web API | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/PersonFile/PersonFileApiClient.cs`, `IPersonFileApi.cs` |
| Pages | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/PersonFile/Pages/PersonFilePage.razor` (`/persons/{PersonId}`), `PersonSearchPage.razor` (`/persons/search`) |
| Integration tests | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/PersonFile/PersonFileTests.cs` |
| Docs | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/docs/phases/phase-16-person-file.md` |

### Routes

```
GET /api/persons/search
GET /api/persons/by-nr/{nrNumber}
GET /api/persons/{personId}
GET /api/persons/{personId}/cases
```

### Snippet A — Endpoint group registration

```12:34:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/PersonFile/PersonFileEndpoints.cs
    public static IEndpointRouteBuilder MapPersonFileEndpoints(this IEndpointRouteBuilder app)
    {
        var group = app.MapGroup("/api/persons")
            .WithTags("PersonFile");

        group.MapGet("/search", SearchPersonFileEndpoint.Handle)
            .WithName("SearchPersonFile")
            .Produces<SearchPersonFileResponse>();

        group.MapGet("/by-nr/{nrNumber}", GetPersonFileEndpoint.HandleByNationalRegisterNumber)
            .WithName("GetPersonFileByNationalRegisterNumber")
            .Produces<GetPersonFileResponse>();

        group.MapGet("/{personId:guid}/cases", ListPersonCasesEndpoint.Handle)
            .WithName("ListPersonCases")
            .Produces<ListPersonCasesResponse>();

        group.MapGet("/{personId:guid}", GetPersonFileEndpoint.HandleById)
            .WithName("GetPersonFile")
            .Produces<GetPersonFileResponse>();

        return app;
    }
```

### Snippet B — Handler composes multiple sources into one response

```48:62:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/PersonFile/GetPersonFile/GetPersonFileHandler.cs
    private async Task<GetPersonFileResponse> BuildResponseAsync(
        PersonId personId,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        authorization.EnsureCanView(currentOfficer);

        var person = await personRepository.GetByIdAsync(personId, cancellationToken)
                     ?? throw new KeyNotFoundException("Person not found.");

        var registerTarget = await personFileQuery.GetRegisterTargetAsync(personId, cancellationToken);
        var cases = await personFileQuery.ListCasesByPersonIdAsync(personId, cancellationToken);
        var householdMembers = await personFileQuery.GetHouseholdMembersAsync(personId, cancellationToken);
        var addresses = await personFileQuery.ListAddressHistoryAsync(personId, cancellationToken);
        var history = await personFileQuery.ListHistoryEventsAsync(personId, cancellationToken);
        var certificates = await certificateRepository.ListByPersonIdAsync(personId, cancellationToken);
        // ... map to GetPersonFileResponse ...
    }
```

### Snippet C — Blazor page pattern

```1:9:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/PersonFile/Pages/PersonFilePage.razor
@page "/persons/{PersonId:guid}"
@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application.Features.PersonFile.GetPersonFile
@using SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web.Api.PersonFile
@inject IPersonFileApi PersonFileApi
@inject NavigationManager Navigation

<RegistrationRoleGate AllowedRoles="[OfficerRole.PopulationOfficer]"
                      RedirectTo="/registration/cases">
```

Page loads via `PersonFileApi.GetPersonFileAsync()` in `OnParametersSetAsync`, uses tabs (`Overview`, `Household`, `Addresses`, `Cases`, `Certificates`), and wraps in `RegistrationRoleGate`.

## 3. Case-Type Feature — ChangeOfAddress (Full Slice)

ChangeOfAddress (Phase 13) is the canonical **write-side workflow** pattern. BirthDeclaration follows the same structure under `Features/BirthDeclaration/`.

### File paths (ChangeOfAddress)

| Layer | Path |
|-------|------|
| Domain aggregate | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressCase.cs` |
| Strong ID + status + repo interface | `ChangeOfAddressCaseId.cs`, `ChangeOfAddressCaseStatus.cs`, `IChangeOfAddressCaseRepository.cs` |
| EF configuration | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/ChangeOfAddressCaseConfiguration.cs` |
| Repository | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/ChangeOfAddressCaseRepository.cs` |
| Guard + auth | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressCaseGuard.cs`, `ChangeOfAddressCaseAuthorization.cs` |
| Use-case handlers | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/ChangeOfAddress/{UseCase}/` (15+ slices) |
| Endpoint group | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressEndpoints.cs` |
| Blazor pages | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/ChangeOfAddress/Pages/ChangeOfAddressCaseDetail.razor`, `ChangeOfAddressCaseList.razor` |
| Components | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Features/ChangeOfAddress/Components/` |
| Web API client | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Web/Api/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressApiClient.cs` |
| Domain tests | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain.Tests/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressCaseTests.cs` |
| Integration tests | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressTests.cs` |
| E2E | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.E2E.Tests/Journeys/ChangeOfAddressE2ETests.cs` |
| Migration | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Infrastructure/Migrations/20260709193137_Phase13ChangeOfAddress.Designer.cs` |
| Docs | `/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/docs/phases/phase-13-change-of-address.md` |

### Standard write-slice flow

```
Endpoint.Handle → Handler.Handle → CaseGuard.GetForEditAsync → aggregate.{DomainMethod}()
→ repository.SaveChangesAsync() → Response DTO
```

### Snippet A — Domain aggregate factory

```66:80:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Domain/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressCase.cs
    public static ChangeOfAddressCase Open(
        PersonId personId,
        BelgianAddress? previousAddress,
        DateTimeOffset openedAt)
    {
        var checklist = ChangeOfAddressCaseChecklist.Empty();
        checklist.MarkPersonIdentified();

        return new ChangeOfAddressCase
        {
            Id = ChangeOfAddressCaseId.New(),
            PersonId = personId,
            Status = ChangeOfAddressCaseStatus.Intake,
            PreviousAddress = previousAddress,
            OpenedAt = openedAt,
            // ...
        };
    }
```

### Snippet B — Handler (open case)

```18:55:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Application/Features/ChangeOfAddress/OpenChangeOfAddressCase/OpenChangeOfAddressCaseHandler.cs
    public async Task<OpenChangeOfAddressCaseResponse> Handle(
        OpenChangeOfAddressCaseRequest request,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        authorization.EnsureCanCreate(currentOfficer);
        await validator.ValidateAndThrowAsync(request, cancellationToken);
        // ... load person, validate NR, resolve previous address ...
        var changeOfAddressCase = ChangeOfAddressCase.Open(
            personId,
            previousAddress,
            timeProvider.GetUtcNow());

        await caseRepository.AddAsync(changeOfAddressCase, cancellationToken);
        await caseRepository.SaveChangesAsync(cancellationToken);

        return new OpenChangeOfAddressCaseResponse(
            changeOfAddressCase.Id.Value,
            person.Id.Value,
            changeOfAddressCase.Status.ToString(),
            changeOfAddressCase.OpenedAt);
    }
```

### Snippet C — Endpoint + integration test pattern

```8:19:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/src/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Api/Features/ChangeOfAddress/OpenChangeOfAddressCase/OpenChangeOfAddressCaseEndpoint.cs
    public static async Task<IResult> Handle(
        OpenChangeOfAddressCaseRequest request,
        OpenChangeOfAddressCaseHandler handler,
        IValidator<OpenChangeOfAddressCaseRequest> validator,
        CancellationToken cancellationToken)
    {
        var validation = await validator.ValidateAsync(request, cancellationToken);
        if (!validation.IsValid) return Results.ValidationProblem(validation.ToDictionary());

        var response = await handler.Handle(request, cancellationToken);
        return Results.Created($"/api/change-of-address/cases/{response.CaseId}", response);
    }
```

Integration tests resolve handlers from `MunicipalAppFactory` DI, set role via `RegistrationTestHelpers.SetRole`, and chain handlers for happy-path flows:

```57:73:/Users/joba/Projects/Private/dotnet/SchaerbeekMunicipality/tests/SchaerbeekMunicipality.Integration.Tests/Features/ChangeOfAddress/ChangeOfAddressTests.cs
    public async Task HappyPath_OpenDeclareConfirm_UpdatesPersonDomicile()
    {
        await using var factory = new MunicipalAppFactory();
        await using var scope = factory.Services.CreateAsyncScope();
        var services = scope.ServiceProvider;
        RegistrationTestHelpers.SetRole(services, OfficerRole.PopulationOfficer);

        var personId = await CreateRegisteredPersonAsync(services);
        var openHandler = services.GetRequiredService<OpenChangeOfAddressCaseHandler>();
        var claimHandler = services.GetRequiredService<ClaimChangeOfAddressCaseHandler>();
        var declareHandler = services.GetRequiredService<DeclareNewAddressHandler>();
        var confirmHandler = services.GetRequiredService<ConfirmAddressChangeHandler>();

        var opened = await openHandler.Handle(new OpenChangeOfAddressCaseRequest(personId), CancellationToken.None);
        var caseId = new ChangeOfAddressCaseId(opened.CaseId);
        await claimHandler.Handle(caseId, CancellationToken.None);
        // ...
    }
```

## Quick Comparison

| Aspect | Intake Correction | Person File | ChangeOfAddress |
|--------|-------------------|-------------|-----------------|
| Domain | Method on existing aggregate | Query interface only | New aggregate + checklist |
| HTTP verb | `PUT` for `CorrectIdentity` | `GET` only | `POST`/`GET`/`DELETE` mix |
| Request reuse | Reuses `RecordIdentityRequest` | Search reuses NR search request | Dedicated `{UseCase}Request` per slice |
| Post-save | Policy re-evaluation | N/A (read-only) | Checklist + status transitions |
| UI location | Section in `RegistrationCaseDetail.razor` | Dedicated `PersonFilePage.razor` | `{Context}CaseDetail.razor` + list page |
| Tests | HTTP (`IntakeCorrectionTests`) + domain guards | Handler + HTTP smoke | Handler chain + domain + E2E |

BirthDeclaration mirrors ChangeOfAddress under `Features/BirthDeclaration/` with the same `{UseCase}Handler` / `{UseCase}Endpoint` / `{Context}Endpoints` / `{Context}CaseGuard` structure.
